name: headache
title: best herbal teas for headache
description: Zingiber officinale tea contains a wealth of bioactive constituents, including gingerols and shogaols, which have potent anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties that help to alleviate headache symptoms. The tea's warming and soothing properties, attributed to its high concentration of volatile oils, can help to relax tense muscles and calm the mind, reducing the severity of headaches.
